visual_description: A man in a light blue shirt and dark tie sits in a black office chair. He rubs his right eye with his right hand, then brings his hand to his mouth and chin, resting his chin on his fist. He looks down and to his left with a pensive expression.
audio_description: A low, sustained, and ominous musical tone plays in the background.
